feed.title: AI Security Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: AIセキュリティに関する日次ニュースダイジェスト - 研究・ニュース・政策動向を自動収集・要約

entry.title: sqlite-utils 4.1.1
entry.content:
Release: sqlite-utils 4.1.1 table.transform() now raises a TransactionError if called while a transaction is open with PRAGMAforeign_keys enabled and the table is referenced by foreign keys with destr

Source: Simon Willison's Weblog

ai_commentary
